name: ultraloop
description: Autonomous software-engineering loop for Claude Code that ORCHESTRATES proven skills rather than reimplementing them — gh-roadmap owns the GitHub Projects board; strategy/spec/TDD/E2E skills do the work. Two role-separated skills: ultraloop:pm plans (product-strategy -> outcome-roadmap -> strategy-red-team -> speckit -> prioritization) and writes the board; ultraloop:loop reads that board and ships it via TDD + pre-merge production E2E, faithfully logging progress back to the board. The board is the single source of truth.
